title: Update business.md Pipeline Scope — governance for commercial pivot
acceptance_criteria: The 'Pipeline Scope' section in .claude/project/business.md no longer contains 'pricing-reviewer: NOT APPLICABLE'
The section now states 'pricing-reviewer: APPLICABLE — billing and payment logic now present (Razorpay UPI, access grants, credit tokens)'
The section now states 'auth risk flag: NOT APPLICABLE — single-instance tool, no user sessions or accounts; Razorpay holds PCI/PII scope for payment instruments'

A 'PCI / PII boundary' note is added: 'Razorpay stores all card/UPI credentials; we store only razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, grant_type, and credit_transactions. No raw payment instrument is ever written to our database.'
The 'Payment / Billing' section is updated to reflect Razorpay is now integrated (India-only, UPI + Razorpay Orders API, no mandate)
No other sections of business.md are changed — scope is strictly the Pipeline Scope block and the Payment/Billing block
output_format: edited file plus a one-paragraph plain-English explanation of every change made and why
